strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure systems
Demonstrated entrepreneurial leadership as founder of GISCollective and experience at early-stage companies (WatchUp, Apon)
Staff-level technical depth architecting high-scale systems (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby) and recent work on AI infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows)
concerns: AI expertise is recent (current role started April 2025) with no demonstrated track record of shipping AI-powered products or platforms at scale
No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML field, which is a preferred qualification for this specialized role
Career trajectory shows individual contributor progression (Senior → Staff) rather than director-level strategic leadership or innovation driving at enterprise scale
response.justification: Strong generalist engineer with 20 years of experience and proven ability to architect complex systems, but the role specifically requires deep, recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI products or platforms. The recent transition to AI infrastructure work (April 2025) is promising but insufficient for a Principal Engineer role focused on AI strategy and advising strategic customers on cutting-edge AI adoption. The candidate would need to demonstrate more substantial AI expertise to be a credible strategic advisor in this specialized domain.
